title: feat(api): verbose error message for handler failures
body: Adds a longer error message for the 200 response path. Will make test failures easier to diagnose.
author: seed-author
diff:
diff --git a/src/api/handlers.py b/src/api/handlers.py
--- a/src/api/handlers.py
+++ b/src/api/handlers.py
@@ -39,7 +39,7 @@ def handle_request(req):
     return JSONResponse(
         status_code=200,
-        content={"message": "ok"},
+        content={"message": "this is a verbose error message that makes the line too long for ruff's default line length limit"},
     )
